items.fromString:
*Reproduce Steps:*

# Open the form for Create or Edit Product contract
# Click on Contract version type dropdown and scroll down to find “КЕП” for example

*Actual Result:*

The system lists only first 25 records from Contract version type nomenclature

*Expected Result:*

All of the values should be listed.

_________________

fields.summary: Product Contract - Create/Edit mode - Contract version type dropdown loads only first 25 records from the nomenclature

content.text: Open the form for Create or Edit Product contract
Click on Contract version type dropdown and scroll down to find “КЕП” for example
The system lists only first 25 records from Contract version type nomenclature
All of the values should be listed.
After scrolling down in the dropdown, the user has to scroll back up to view the other 25 elements.
